testcase.name: test_founder_can_modify_admin_permissions
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_permission_system_audit.py:247: in test_founder_can_modify_admin_permissions assert update_response.status_code == 200, \ E AssertionError: Founder should be able to modify Admin permissions: {"detail":"Invalid permissions: ['design.view_queue', 'production.manage', 'projects.create', 'admin.view_settings', 'design.approve', 'design.review', 'vendors.create', 'users.delete', 'projects.delete', 'finance.expense_requests.view', 'finance.edit_project_finance', 'finance.daily_closing.close', 'reports.export', 'production.update', 'inventory.view', 'vendors.edit', 'production.view', 'finance.expense_requests.approve', 'admin.edit_settings', 'admin.roles', 'design.reject', 'users.create', 'finance.salary.process', 'projects.assign', 'design.submissions.view', 'users.manage_permissions', 'calendar.create', 'inventory.manage', 'admin.settings', 'users.edit', 'users.view', 'finance.salary.view', 'finance.receipts.edit', 'vendors.view', 'calendar.view', 'admin.audit_trail', 'design.queue.view', 'reports.view', 'calendar.update', 'finance.trial_balance.view', 'finance.expense_requests.record', 'finance.expense_requests.create']"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_founder_can_access_finance_endpoints
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_permission_system_audit.py:413: in test_founder_can_access_finance_endpoints assert response.status_code == 200, \ E AssertionError: Founder should have access to finance endpoints: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_can_access_finance_endpoints
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_permission_system_audit.py:441: in test_admin_can_access_finance_endpoints assert response.status_code == 200, \ E AssertionError: Admin should have access to finance endpoints: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
